message:
refactor: Extract CommandRunner trait for testable backup operations

Introduces a CommandRunner trait to abstract SSH command execution,
enabling unit testing of backup_before_deploy without real SSH:

Trait Design:
- CommandRunner trait with run_command returning BoxFuture for async ops
- SshExecutor implements CommandRunner for production use
- MockSshExecutor implements CommandRunner for test scenarios

Function Refactoring:
- New backup_before_deploy_with_runner<R: CommandRunner> does the work
- Public backup_before_deploy wraps it with SshExecutor (unchanged API)

Error Handling Improvements:
- Replace if let Err patterns with match blocks for mkdir and cp commands
- Log stderr from failed commands for better diagnostics
- Maintain non-fatal semantics (backup failures don't block deploys)

Test Coverage:
- backup_before_deploy_skips_on_low_disk test validates disk space check
- Uses MockSshExecutor with configurable command results

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
